product_information.description: De SPF 50+ Melk wordt aanbevolen voor de gevoelige huid die blootgesteld wordt aan felle zon.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: AVENE THERMAL SPRING WATER (AVENE, AQUA). DIETHYLAMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL HEXYL BENZOATE. DIISOPROPYL SEBACATE, COCOCAPRYLATE/CAPRATE. DICARPYLYL CARBONATE. DIETHYLHEXYL BUTAMIDO TRIAZONE. GLYCERIN. BIS-ETHYLHEXYLOXYPHENOL METHOXYPHENYL TRIAZINE GLYCERYL STEARATE CITRATE. ORYZA SATIVA (RICE) STARCH (ORYZA SATIVA STARCH). PENTYLENE GLYCOL, C12-15 ALKYL BENZOATE. VP/EICOSENE COPOLYMER. BENZOIC ACID. CAPRYLIC/CAPRIC TIGLYCERIDE. CELLULOSE GUM. CETEARYL OLIVATE. FRAGRANCE (PARFUM). GLYCINE SOJA (SOYBEAN) OIL (GLYCINE SOJA OIL). HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL (HELIANTHUS ANNUUS SEED OIL). MICROCRYSTALUNE CELLULOSE SODIUM HYDROXIDE. SORBITAN OLIVATE. TOCOPHEROL. TOCOPHERYL GLUCOSIDE. XANTHAN GUM.
